description: Product Description Revive & refresh dull, dehydrated skin with our Hyaluronic Face & Body Mist. Infused with Sodium Hyaluronate, Peptides & Betaine, this cooling mist will help lock in moisture and stimulate collagen production. Give your skin the TLC it deserves! Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Saccharomyces Polypeptides, Sodium Hyaluronate, Propylene Glycol, Phenoxyethanol, Betaine, Caprylyl Glycol, Parfum, Chlorphenesin, Dipropylene Glycol. Directions Use after cleansing & toning skin for maximum absorption. Alternatively, spray throughout the day to give your skin a pick-me-up. Leave the product to soak in before applying further products. Use alongside our Face Facts collections to enhance your skincare routine. Safety Warning Do not use after expiry date. Close tightly after use. Do not store in bathroom to avoid humidity. See more
